EmailTemplate.name: Retail Customer Welcome
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to ABC Fashion Co {!Account.FirstName} {!Account.LastName}!
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hello {!Account.FirstName},
Thank you for registering for the ABC Fashion Co. Loyalty Program. We’re excited to welcome you.
As a member, you’ll be able to enjoy exclusive offers, updates, and a more personalized shopping experience with ABC Fashion Co.
To complete or update your profile, please click the link below: {!Account.Profile_URL__c}
Thank you again for joining ABC Fashion Co.
Sincerely,
ABC Fashion Co.
